summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of College Quiz Platform with multi-role system. All major features tested successfully including login flows, dashboards, quiz functionality, and navigation.
passed_tests: Login page renders with Password/OTP toggle tabs
Student login (S2024001) navigates to Student Dashboard correctly
Teacher login (T001) navigates to Teacher Dashboard correctly
Admin login (A001) navigates to Admin Dashboard correctly
Student Dashboard shows all stats cards, upcoming quizzes, recent results
Quiz Attempt page shows questions, navigation grid, timer, violation counter
Quiz navigation between different question types (MCQ, Boolean, Short Answer)
Analytics page shows performance metrics and multiple charts
Leaderboard page shows top 3 podium and full rankings table
Semester Results page shows grades table, CGPA progression, and summary cards
Teacher Quiz Builder allows question creation with different types
Live Monitor shows student tracking table with real-time data
Admin User Management shows student/teacher tables with Add User modal
Back button navigation works correctly across all pages
Role-based routing works correctly (S=student, T=teacher, A=admin)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Responsive design with smooth, rounded elements (no boxy design)
Charts and visualizations render correctly using Recharts library
